title: ochrosia novocaledonica
intro: Ochrosia novocaledonica, also known as the 'New Caledonian Tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ochrosia novocaledonica include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
